memories.a:
The universe is not only queerer than we suppose but queerer than we can suppose.
What if consciousness is not produced by the brain but received by it — like a 
radio tuning into frequencies that exist independent of the hardware?
Imagine a civilization that has existed for a billion years. What would they 
remember? What would they have forgotten? What questions would they still be asking?
The most dangerous idea in science fiction is not the robot uprising — it is the 
possibility that we ar
memories.summary:
science_fiction->
The universe is not only quee

memories.a:
e already inside a story being told by something that cannot 
explain itself to us. Philip K Dick asked: do androids dream of electric sheep? 
The better question is: do electric sheep dream of us?
Every possible universe exists. We just happen to be conscious in this one.
Intelligence is not the destination — it is the method of asking better questions.
memories.summary: science_fiction->e already inside a story being
